meta.title: HEXACO (60)
meta.subtitle: Assess six broad personality dimensions.
meta.description: A 60-item HEXACO-style inventory with six scales and reverse-keyed items.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment supports self-reflection and does not provide a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

interpretation.low: Lower range for this HEXACO dimension in your current responses.
interpretation.medium: Mid-range for this HEXACO dimension in your current responses.
interpretation.high: Higher range for this HEXACO dimension in your current responses.

items.hexaco60_001: I see myself as someone who is sincere in relationships.
items.hexaco60_002: I see myself as someone who is fair in competition.
items.hexaco60_003: I see myself as someone who is uninterested in manipulating others.
items.hexaco60_004: I see myself as someone who is modest about achievements.
items.hexaco60_005: I see myself as someone who is resistant to greed.
items.hexaco60_006: I see myself as someone who is tempted by special treatment.
items.hexaco60_007: I see myself as someone who is comfortable exploiting loopholes.
items.hexaco60_008: I see myself as someone who is status-seeking at others expense.
items.hexaco60_009: I see myself as someone who is drawn to luxury and excess.
items.hexaco60_010: I see myself as someone who is willing to flatter for advantage.
items.hexaco60_011: I see myself as someone who is emotionally sensitive.
items.hexaco60_012: I see myself as someone who is concerned about safety.
items.hexaco60_013: I see myself as someone who is moved by others suffering.
items.hexaco60_014: I see myself as someone who is attached to close bonds.
items.hexaco60_015: I see myself as someone who is anxious in risky situations.
items.hexaco60_016: I see myself as someone who is fearless in physically dangerous contexts.
items.hexaco60_017: I see myself as someone who is detached from emotional pain.
items.hexaco60_018: I see myself as someone who is unaffected by uncertainty.
items.hexaco60_019: I see myself as someone who is indifferent to others distress.
items.hexaco60_020: I see myself as someone who is quick to suppress vulnerability.
items.hexaco60_021: I see myself as someone who is socially confident.
items.hexaco60_022: I see myself as someone who is energetic in groups.
items.hexaco60_023: I see myself as someone who is optimistic in social contexts.
items.hexaco60_024: I see myself as someone who is comfortable taking initiative.
items.hexaco60_025: I see myself as someone who is expressive around others.
items.hexaco60_026: I see myself as someone who is reserved with unfamiliar people.
items.hexaco60_027: I see myself as someone who is quiet in social events.
items.hexaco60_028: I see myself as someone who is drained by frequent interaction.
items.hexaco60_029: I see myself as someone who is hesitant to lead conversations.
items.hexaco60_030: I see myself as someone who is more inward than outward in social spaces.
items.hexaco60_031: I see myself as someone who is patient when provoked.
items.hexaco60_032: I see myself as someone who is willing to forgive mistakes.
items.hexaco60_033: I see myself as someone who is cooperative in disagreements.
items.hexaco60_034: I see myself as someone who is slow to anger.
items.hexaco60_035: I see myself as someone who is gentle when frustrated.
items.hexaco60_036: I see myself as someone who is irritable under pressure.
items.hexaco60_037: I see myself as someone who is vengeful after conflicts.
items.hexaco60_038: I see myself as someone who is argumentative in minor disputes.
items.hexaco60_039: I see myself as someone who is stubborn in compromise.
items.hexaco60_040: I see myself as someone who is critical when others fail expectations.
items.hexaco60_041: I see myself as someone who is organized in daily work.
items.hexaco60_042: I see myself as someone who is disciplined with commitments.
items.hexaco60_043: I see myself as someone who is careful in execution.
items.hexaco60_044: I see myself as someone who is persistent with goals.
items.hexaco60_045: I see myself as someone who is reliable with responsibilities.
items.hexaco60_046: I see myself as someone who is careless with details.
items.hexaco60_047: I see myself as someone who is inconsistent in follow-through.
items.hexaco60_048: I see myself as someone who is impulsive in planning.
items.hexaco60_049: I see myself as someone who is quick to postpone priorities.
items.hexaco60_050: I see myself as someone who is unstructured in routines.
items.hexaco60_051: I see myself as someone who is curious about ideas.
items.hexaco60_052: I see myself as someone who is imaginative in thinking.
items.hexaco60_053: I see myself as someone who is interested in art and aesthetics.
items.hexaco60_054: I see myself as someone who is open to unusual viewpoints.
items.hexaco60_055: I see myself as someone who is creative in everyday life.
items.hexaco60_056: I see myself as someone who is prefers familiar experiences.
items.hexaco60_057: I see myself as someone who is uninterested in abstract reflection.
items.hexaco60_058: I see myself as someone who is resistant to novel approaches.
items.hexaco60_059: I see myself as someone who is less responsive to artistic expression.
items.hexaco60_060: I see myself as someone who is unlikely to seek intellectual novelty.
